response.step_by_step_log: The video was reviewed from start to finish. I monitored for any vocal music tracks. The audio consists only of spoken dialogue by the character Anya Melfissa explaining her merchandise. No songs or vocal music were detected, therefore no web search was performed or required. The scenes were mapped chronologically based on the different merchandise items introduced.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional showcase for birthday merchandise, presented by the virtual YouTuber Anya Melfissa. Throughout the video, she describes an acrylic keyholder, a hand mirror, a voice pack, and a Hololive Official Card Game card. The audio consists entirely of her speaking in a mixture of Indonesian, Japanese, and English, with no vocal music tracks present.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa introduces an acrylic keyholder merchandise item.
Anya Melfissa presents a hand mirror merchandise item, highlighting its design.
Anya Melfissa introduces her birthday situational voice pack.
Anya Melfissa details the bonus items included with the purchase of the voice pack set, including a postcard with a foil-stamped autograph.
Anya Melfissa explains the additional bonus of a special card for the Hololive Official Card Game included with the set.
